query:
SELECT 
    p.id as partner_id,
    p.name as partner_name,
    c.name as city_name,
    pc.id as partner_city_id,
    pc.contractStatus
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.name = '张浩炜';
